TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Albert_Vërria, title = Albert_Vërria, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Albert_Vërria} }

S.FORM: Albert Vërria ga 3 na ryax tay 9 na byacing squ kawas na 1936 - squ . 17 ryax 8 byacing 2015 kawas qu hintgilan nya. hiya ga spzyanyg blaq na pzyangay ega ka squliq na Albania. wal tmasot mqwas biru beh qalang nya.

Albert Vërria ga 3 na ryax tay 9 na byacing squ kawas na 1936 - squ . 17 ryax 8 byacing 2015 kawas qu hintgilan nya. hiya ga spzyanyg blaq na pzyangay ega ka squliq na Albania. wal tmasot mqwas biru beh qalang nya.
S.PHON: alβert **rria ɣa * na rjax taj * na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** - s~ɕqu . ** rjax * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ **** kawas~ɕ qu ħintɣilan nja. ħija ɣa s~ɕpzjanjɣ βlaq na pzjaŋaj eɣa ka s~ɕquliq na alβania. wal tmas~ɕot mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ qalaŋ nja.
